title: Context and Priorities for Digital Resilience
summary: The Digital Resilience Guide positions digital resilience as a response to operational dependence on digital services, exposure to disruption, and the need to maintain continuity of banking services.
focus: Use threat context and digital dependencies to prioritize the most material control areas.
Link cyber risk assessments to the impact on the Bank's services, customers and core operations.
Perform analysis updates when significant changes occur in services, technology, or threat patterns.
analogy: It's like choosing a security system for your home, you have to know first which rooms store valuables, not install alarms all over the roof.

roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Configure system auto-failover and daily backups.
roleTranslations.board: Board Mode: Budget the cost of providing reliable BCP/DRC infrastructure.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review service continuity procedures in the perspective of OJK regulations.
roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight of 'Digital Resilience Context and Priorities'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.

title: Digital Resilience Governance and Accountability
summary: The guide reinforces the importance of board accountability, policy direction, division of roles across functions, and ongoing monitoring of an organization's digital resilience.
focus: Ensure that the Board of Directors, Board of Commissioners and control functions have a clear mandate on digital resilience.
Align digital resilience policies and frameworks with business, IT and risk management strategies.
Build cross-functional coordination so that decision making during disruptions or incidents can take place quickly and be documented.
analogy: Like appointing a ship captain when a storm comes. If everyone wants to hold the helm, the ship will sink.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight of 'Digital Resilience Governance and Accountability'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Implement technical controls (system configuration/patching) according to server hardening rules to realize 'Digital Resilience Governance and Accountability'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify policy documents/SOPs for 'Digital Resilience Governance and Accountability'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

title: Assets, Essential Services, and ICT Dependence
summary: Digital resilience analysis needs to start from critical services, assets, data, processes, and technological dependencies and supporting parties that affect operational continuity.
focus: Maintain an inventory of critical assets and services along with their internal and external dependencies.
Link threat and vulnerability identification to service criticality and operational impact.
Use dependency mapping results to determine protection, monitoring, and recovery priorities.
analogy: Similar to the anatomy of the human body. You have to know which organs if you get sick will make you faint, so that treatment is prioritized.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight of 'Assets, Critical Services and ICT Dependencies'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Apply technical controls (system configuration/patching) according to server hardening rules to realize 'ICT Assets, Critical Services and Dependencies'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify policy documents/SOPs for 'ICT Assets, Critical Services and Dependencies'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

title: Incident Prevention, Detection and Response
summary: The guidance highlights the need for preventative safeguards, continuous monitoring, incident escalation, and rapid coordination of response actions to maintain the resilience of digital services.
focus: Ensure preventive control, monitoring and incident triage are connected in a consistent operational flow.
Establish lines of communication, escalation, and decisions in the event of a disruption or cyberattack.
Use incident lessons learned to update control baselines and response procedures.
analogy: Like installing a smoke detection system and fire extinguisher. As soon as there was a spark, the alarm sounded, and the fire was immediately extinguished before it burned down the entire building.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight of 'Incident Prevention, Detection and Response'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Enable centralized logging (SIEM) and automatic anomaly alerts regarding 'Incident Prevention, Detection and Response'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Prepare an incident notification template to OJK/Kominfo for 'Incident Prevention, Detection and Response' within the time limit according to regulatory SLA (example: 3x24 hours).

title: Service Recovery and Adaptation
summary: Digital resiliency doesn't stop at containment, but includes service recovery, data recovery, and adapting controls after a disruption or incident occurs.
focus: Set up recovery scenarios for priority services and their supporting assets and data.
Ensure the recovery process results in learning, updating procedures, and strengthening controls.
Measure the success of recovery in terms of services, data, and organizational readiness to return to operations.
analogy: Just like a first aid kit and health insurance in case of an accident. You fall, get it treated, keep learning so you don't walk the same potholes.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight of 'Service Recovery and Adaptation'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Apply technical controls (system configuration/patching) according to server hardening rules to realize 'Service Recovery and Adaptation'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify policy/SOP documents for 'Service Recovery and Adaptation'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.

title: Continuous Testing and Improvement
summary: The guide reinforces the importance of technical testing, scenario-based exercises, maturity evaluation, and continuous improvement follow-up as the foundation for strengthening digital resilience.
focus: Combine technical testing, scenario exercises, and maturity evaluation in one measurable improvement cycle.
Ensure that the test results produce an action plan that is monitored until completion.
Use evaluation results to refine digital resilience investment priorities, competencies and governance.
analogy: It's like a fire simulation exercise in the office. It's better to panic during training than to be stunned when there's actually a fire.

roleTranslations.bod: Board Mode: Provide strategic oversight of 'Continuous Testing and Improvement'. Make sure these initiatives support business goals and do not disrupt operations.
roleTranslations.sysadmin: SysAdmin Mode: Implement technical controls (system configuration/patching) according to server hardening rules to realize 'Continuous Testing and Improvement'.
roleTranslations.legal: Legal Mode: Review and ratify policy/SOP documents for 'Continuous Testing and Improvement'. Ensure compliance with legal and compliance aspects.
